message:
test: Add real-world pattern tests proving numpy works in workerd

12 tests exercising popular Python patterns, all running in workerd
(same runtime as wrangler dev):

- Data analysis: descriptive stats, moving averages (finance)
- ML: linear regression, feature normalization, cosine similarity
- Signal processing: convolution filters, signal correlation
- API patterns: batch scoring, weighted ranking
- Pure Python: URL parsing, dataclass serialization, CSV processing

Also fix deploy.js to filter C extension packages from pip download,
and simplify init template.

Known limitations (np.fft, np.random.default_rng, np.percentile
need additional C extensions not yet statically linked).

files.patch:
@@ -41,10 +41,6 @@ export async function init(args) {
     `[project]
 name = "${name}"
 version = "0.1.0"
-# dependencies = [
-#     "requests",    # pure-Python packages work out of the box
-#     "numpy",       # C extensions auto-select the right WASM variant
-# ]
 
 [tool.pymode]
 main = "src/entry.py"
